summary: Backend-only testing of Tennis Training AI video upload + analysis feature. Executed 18 pytest tests against public URL (https://court-coach-35.preview.emergentagent.com) covering health, auth guards, video upload for all 4 shot types (serve, forehand, backhand, volley), video analysis for all 4 shot types, mock/short/large base64 data, 'first_upload' achievement award, XP awarding (+50), analyze-of-missing-video 404, and full upload->analyze->list persistence. All 18 tests PASSED (100%). AI analysis via Emergent LLM (gpt-4o) returned all 7 required fields with correct types/ranges (technique_score 1-100, balance_rating 1-10, non-empty suggested_fixes list, non-empty strings). Free-tier upload limit (10/week) also verified working (had to make test user premium to run full flow).

minor.issue: Response text still says '3 uploads per week' for free tier, but code enforces 10/week. Mismatch between marketed and enforced limit.
video_data stored as 500-char snippet only; actual video bytes are discarded, so downstream real video analysis is impossible. Acceptable per current mocked design but should be documented.

action_items: Optional: align /api/premium/status free-tier copy ('3 uploads per week') with the enforced 10/week limit.
Optional: emit a real 429/403 clear error message showing weekly upload count and reset time.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1500+ lines; consider splitting into routers (auth, videos, training, gamification, friends).
Multiple duplicated OAuth/session dependency patterns; `get_current_user` should be a FastAPI Depends() rather than manual authorization Header handling in every endpoint.

startup index creation logs 'MongoDB indexes created successfully' but if `db.users.create_index('email', unique=True)` fails due to prior duplicates it swallows the error at the outer except - fine but silent.
video_base64 is discarded (only 500 chars stored). Function docstring says 'accepts any video format' which is accurate for the API contract but no real analysis is possible.

In analyze_video the AI JSON parsing has minimal validation; if AI returns wrong types (e.g., technique_score as string) they will be stored as-is. Consider Pydantic-validating the parsed dict before returning.
`total_matches` computation in create_match uses find(...).to_list(1000) then len(); prefer count_documents.
seed_data_creation: Test user + session inserted directly into MongoDB (bypasses Google OAuth) with premium=True so weekly upload limit doesn't block flow tests. Cleaned up after session.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth is Emergent Google OAuth; for backend tests, seed a user + user_sessions doc directly (see conftest.py). Free-tier upload limit is 10/week - use premium=True in fixture or reset between runs. AI analysis has robust shot-specific fallback so tests never depend on live gpt-4o response.
rca_of_issue: N/A - all feature acceptance criteria pass. Initial 2 failures were caused by the free-tier 10/week upload limit tripping during the last two tests; resolved by making the seeded test user premium (validates the correct enforcement of the limit itself as a side-effect).
